tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Heard It Through The Grapevine

content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Treated me kind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Sweet destiny[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
Carried me through desperation[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
To the one that was waiting for me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
It took so long[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Still I believed[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Somehow the one that I needed[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Would find me eventually[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I had a vision of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And it was all that you've given to me[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Prayed through the nights[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Felt so alone[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Suffered through alienation[/tab]

Carried the weight on my own[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
So I believed[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
And now I know i've succeeded[/tab]

In finding the place I conceived[/tab]

[Chorus] (x2)
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I had a vision of love[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
And it was all that you've given to me[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
I've realized a dream, mmmmm[/tab]

And I visualized[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
The love that came to be[/tab]

Feel so alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I'm so thankful that i've received[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]

So faithfully (faithfully)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]

Would find me eventually (would find me)[/tab]

I had a vision of love[/tab]
